title: Sales Executive (Marine Lubricant)
description:
You will be responsible for identifying and developing new business opportunities within the marine and offshore market. This role involves managing the full sales cycle, including sales development, order processing, customer coordination, and debt collection. The position also supports marketing-related initiatives while driving assigned sales targets.

Open to candidate who are sales driven .

Package includes:

Basic Salary | Commission | Transport Allowance | Attractive bonus

Work Location: Tuas area

Key Responsibilities

  1. Prospect and develop new customers and accounts within the marine and offshore sector.

  2. Prepare sales quotations and process sales orders, including delivery scheduling and coordination.

  3. Conduct regular customer visits to identify growth opportunities and maintain strong customer relationships.

  4. Drive sales growth to achieve volume and revenue targets set by management.

  5. Manage customer credit control and debt collection in collaboration with the finance department, including risk management for both spot and long-term business deals.

  6. Deliver product presentations and provide basic technical knowledge through annual seminars and customized customer clinics.

  7. Support the department in achieving overall functional goals and targets.

Requirements

Education:

  • Preferably a Polytechnic graduate in Marine Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or Business-related disciplines.

Skills & Competencies

  1. Strong interpersonal, communication, presentation, and negotiation skills.

  2. Customer-oriented, self-motivated, and results-driven.

  3. Dynamic, proactive, and able to take initiative while working independently or as part of a team.

  4. Proficient in Microsoft Office applications (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).


HOW TO APPLY?

Please submit your resume to elsie.lee@stanfordmanpower.com for a faster shortlisting process! - Elsie Lee (Reg no: R1109571)

postedCompany.description:

Our aim is to build long-term relationships with our clients and candidates, and we take pride in our proven track record of closing multiple placements across various multinational companies.


At Stanford Manpower, we are committed to providing a quality recruitment experience to all our clients and candidates. 


We understand that hiring the right talent can be a costly and time-consuming process. Therefore, we offer a seamless and cost-effective recruitment experience that meets our clients' needs. Our transparent pricing structure and willingness to work with our clients to find solutions that fit their budget are a testament to our commitment to providing access to top talent to all businesses, regardless of their size or industry.


We consider ourselves a partner invested in our clients' success and are passionate about connecting great talent with great opportunities. 


Contact us today to learn more about our services and how we can help you achieve your recruitment goals.
